scenarios.description: child(1) after cache invalidation rebuilds shadowChildrenRef and returns new element
scenarios.precondition: parent created and child(0) called once to build cache
scenarios.expectedResult: second child element returned after append invalidates cache
pseudocode: TEST TC08 child rebuilds cache after mutation
Element result = parent.child(1);          // rebuilds filtered list

scenarios.description: child(1) skips DataNode and CDataNode, returns correct second Element
scenarios.precondition: parent has mixed children: DataNode, Element, CDataNode, Element
pseudocode: TEST TC09 child skips non-Element Node types
Element result = parent.child(1);        // skip DataNode and CDataNode
